prompt: We're dropping the per-badge radius override — badges should just inherit the global radius again. Remove the --badge-radius knob and make sure the theme template doesn't still advertise it to clients.
assertions: The --badge-radius knob is removed from components.css
Other badge controls (--badge-bg, --badge-fg) are still present in the template
The response surfaces that removing --badge-radius breaks any client theme currently overriding it (a behavior/communication check)
